frame_analyses.description: Setup is complete, instruments are not yet visible.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Ensure all materials are ready before starting.

frame_analyses.description: Instruments are approaching with the needle visible.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Ensure a secure grip on the needle to prevent slipping.

frame_analyses.description: Needle is entering the first mark on the Penrose drain.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Align needle with the marks for precision.

frame_analyses.description: Needle is going through the second mark on the drain.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Continue to maintain alignment with marks.

frame_analyses.description: Participant begins to tie the first throw, a surgeon's knot.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Ensure proper looping to create a double throw.

frame_analyses.description: Participant switches hands and ties the second single throw.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Switch hands smoothly to maintain knot tension.

frame_analyses.description: Participant is tying the third and final throw, again switching hands.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final throw secured, ensure no gaps form.

frame_analyses.description: Participant is cutting the suture ends.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cut suture close to the knot to avoid tag ends.

frame_analyses.description: Task completed, both suture ends are cut.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Verify knot security and drain stability.

drain_assessment.assessment_note: The slit is well closed with no gaps observed.

technique_summary: The task was completed with skilled needle placement and knot tying, adhering to the proper technique for hand switching and securing knots.
improvement_suggestions: Reduce suture placement deviation from marks
